message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "ユーザ" as user
boundary "ブラウザ" as browser
boundary "web.php" as webphp
boundary "Kouka2_1Controller" as controller
database "Restdata" as restdata
boundary "index.blade.php" as indexblade
boundary "show.blade.php" as showblade

user -> browser: 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka2_1]
browser -> webphp: GET[/kouka2_1]
webphp -> controller: @index
controller -> restdata: all()
restdata --> controller: 
controller -> indexblade: 
user -> browser: 検索ボタンを押下
browser -> webphp: GET[/kouka2_1/find]
webphp -> controller: @find
controller -> restdata: where()->first()
restdata --> controller: 
controller -> showblade: 

note right of user
ユーザ
end note

note right of browser
ブラウザ
end note

note right of webphp
web.php
end note

note right of controller
Kouka2_1Controller
end note

note right of restdata
Restdata
end note

note right of indexblade
index.blade.php
end note

note right of showblade
show.blade.php
end note

@enduml
